eligible_applicant_type: Local NGOs (via partnerships with UK-based organizations)
geographic_restrictions: Global (with preference for vulnerable regions and international applicants requiring a UK-based reference)
demographic_requirements: Applicants must demonstrate strong experience in marine conservation or fisheries management, proven project success, and the ability to deliver long-term impact in biodiversity conservation and sustainable fisheries development. Preference given to organizations securing co-funding.
eligibility_summary: Open to UK-registered charities and non-profits, local NGOs (via UK partnerships), and international applicants (with a UK-based reference). Applicants must have experience in marine conservation or fisheries management, measurable outcomes, sustainability strategies, and monitoring plans. Co-funding is preferred.
